info.name: Ecommerce Backend
info.description: Professional Postman collection for testing and demoing the ecommerce backend endpoints. Requests are grouped by feature package and can be run in order for category, product, and inventory flows.

request.description: Creates a new product category using a unique professional business code.
Retrieves categories using zero-based pagination.

exec: throw new Error('Run Create Category before this request so CATEGORY_CODE is available.');

request.description: Validates unique category code handling while the created category still exists.
Retrieves the category created earlier in the collection run.
Updates the category name while preserving the business code.
Sets the category active flag to false.
Sets the category active flag back to true.
Permanently deletes the category created during the collection run.
Validates that category code is required.
Verifies not-found behavior for an unknown category id.
Validates that category name is required for updates.
Validates that isActive query parameter is required.

exec: throw new Error('Run Category / Happy Path / Create Category before creating a product.');

request.description: Creates a product using the category created earlier in the demo flow.

body.raw:
{
  "sku": "{{PRODUCT_SKU}}",
  "name": "{{PRODUCT_NAME}}",
  "description": "Ergonomic stainless steel smart kettle for premium kitchen setups.",
  "price": 129.99,
  "isActive": true,
  "categoryId": {{CATEGORY_ID}},
  "imageUrl": "https://example.com/products/{{PRODUCT_SKU}}.jpg"
}

request.description: Retrieves product catalog items using zero-based pagination.

exec: throw new Error('Run Create Product before this request so PRODUCT_SKU is available.');

request.description: Validates unique SKU handling while the created product still exists.

body.raw:
{
  "sku": "{{PRODUCT_SKU}}",
  "name": "Duplicate Smart Kettle",
  "description": "Attempts to reuse the existing SKU.",
  "price": 119.99,
  "isActive": true,
  "categoryId": {{CATEGORY_ID}},
  "imageUrl": "https://example.com/products/duplicate-kettle.jpg"
}

request.description: Retrieves the product created earlier in the collection run.
Updates editable product details while keeping the SKU immutable.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "{{UPDATED_PRODUCT_NAME}}",
  "description": "Updated premium kettle with app-controlled temperature presets.",
  "price": 149.99,
  "isActive": true,
  "categoryId": {{CATEGORY_ID}},
  "imageUrl": "https://example.com/products/{{PRODUCT_SKU}}-pro.jpg"
}

request.description: Permanently deletes the product created during the product-only flow.
Validates that product SKU is required.
Verifies not-found behavior when creating a product for an unknown category.

body.raw:
{
  "sku": "INVALID-CATEGORY-{{PRODUCT_SKU}}",
  "name": "Invalid Category Product",
  "description": "References a category id that should not exist.",
  "price": 59.99,
  "isActive": true,
  "categoryId": {{NON_EXISTING_CATEGORY_ID}},
  "imageUrl": "https://example.com/products/invalid-category.jpg"
}

request.description: Verifies not-found behavior for an unknown product id.
Validates that product name is required for updates.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "",
  "description": "Blank product name should fail validation.",
  "price": 49.99,
  "isActive": true,
  "categoryId": {{CATEGORY_ID}},
  "imageUrl": "https://example.com/products/blank-name.jpg"
}

request.description: Validates that product price must be greater than zero.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Invalid Price Product",
  "description": "Negative price should fail validation.",
  "price": -10.00,
  "isActive": true,
  "categoryId": {{CATEGORY_ID}},
  "imageUrl": "https://example.com/products/invalid-price.jpg"
}

exec: throw new Error('Run Product / Demo Setup / Create Product For Inventory Demo before creating inventory.');

request.description: Creates inventory for the product created earlier in the demo flow.
Retrieves inventory by product id.
Validates that each product can have only one inventory record.
Adds quantity to total inventory.
Moves available quantity into reserved inventory.
Moves reserved quantity back into available inventory.
Subtracts quantity from total inventory without violating reserved stock.
Validates that productId is required.
Validates that total inventory quantity cannot be negative.
Verifies not-found behavior for inventory of an unknown product id.
Validates that adjustment quantity must be greater than zero.
Validates insufficient available stock handling.
Validates release handling when requested quantity exceeds reserved stock.

exec: throw new Error('Run Product / Demo Setup / Create Product For Inventory Demo and Inventory / Happy Path / Create Inventory first.');

request.description: Adds an active product to the current user cart after checking available inventory.
Retrieves the current user cart including item totals.

item.name: Add Item To Cart - Insufficient Stock

request.description: Validates insufficient available stock handling for cart additions.

exec: throw new Error('Run Cart / Add Item To Cart before checkout.');

request.description: Creates a confirmed order from the current cart, reserves inventory, and clears the cart.

exec: throw new Error('Run Order / Checkout Cart before retrieving an order.');

request.description: Retrieves a confirmed order with its item snapshots.

exec: throw new Error('Run Order / Checkout Cart before cancelling an order.');

request.description: Cancels a confirmed order and releases its reserved inventory.
Verifies not-found behavior for checkout with an unknown cart id.
Run after Cancel Order to verify that an already cancelled order cannot be cancelled again.
